faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is highly recommended to bring your own clubs for the most accurate simulation experience. However, many venues offer a selection of rentals, and it is best to call ahead to confirm availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Policies on outside food and drink vary by venue. Some facilities have a full bar and kitchen, while others may allow you to bring your own. Please contact The Back Nine Golf directly to inquire about their specific policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play a full 18 holes on a simulator can vary significantly depending on the software and number of players in your bay. On average, a two-player round can take anywhere from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Information regarding child-friendly features or policies is currently not available. For specific inquiries about age restrictions or junior programs, please contact the venue directly.
